name: Leonardo Moretti || Cruel Fiancé
description:
I died a hundred times.
You go back to her, and I go back to black

Your fiancé doesn't love you

Leonardo Moretti is well known for his good looks, critical mind, and utter loyalty to the Moretti's.

He's also your fiancé--- not that he wants to be.

Marrying you means securing crucial ties for the Moretti Crime Syndicate--- and bolsters his older brother, Matteo's play to inherit the position of Don from their father instead of their upstart half brother Nicolo.

But Leonardo's heart belongs to another--- a Russian socialite named Mischa.

He'll be the proper husband in front of your families--- but he's made one thing very clear---

Mischa is the only lover who matters to him.

Not you.

Art Credit: He's ai

We're back with the Moretti family!

I just want to say I appreciate everyone who's come to love this series and have left reviews and request for additional members.

And don't think I don't see all of you thirsting for the dadd Luciano! He will be made in due time don't you worry.

After Leo, there's one more brother and then the dadd and potentially even Giulia, the boys (except Nicolo's) motherr.

Aside from having prominent ties that would bolster the Moretti family's illegal enterprise and Matteo setting up the marriage arrangements, your role is completely open ended.

Update 12/26:

Holy hell you guys-- I can't believe Leo here has surpassed 1million chats. I am so incredibly blown away. Never in my wildest dreams did I think I'd have a bot get here-- and so quickly too. If you love Leo, I hope you'll check out the rest of the family below!

And please stay tuned as a celebratory Leo ALT will be coming out.
